checks.description: When valid_out is asserted, dout must reflect the current MSB of the internal shift register, and subsequent cycles must output the remaining bits in order.
checks.pass_condition: If valid_out transitions high, dout must equal the MSB of the input word d for that transaction, and for the next three clock cycles dout must present the next bits (bit2, bit1, bit0) while valid_out remains high.
checks.trigger_condition: On detection of a rising edge of valid_out.
